detail.description: Yohendrick Piñango homers (5) on a fly ball to right center field. Ernie Clement scores.
Yohendrick Piñango doubles (6) on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Brandon Valenzuela to 3rd.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a ground ball to right fielder Adolis García. Myles Straw to 3rd.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford.
Yohendrick Piñango doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Yohendrick Piñango to 3rd. Yohendrick Piñango advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Adolis García.
Yohendrick Piñango homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Taylor Ward.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward, deflected by third baseman Coby Mayo.
Yohendrick Piñango homers (2) on a line drive to center field.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Lenyn Sosa scores. Nathan Lukes to 3rd.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 2nd.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a line drive to center fielder Jhostynxon Garcia. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 2nd.
Yohendrick Piñango doubles (4) on a line drive to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez.

Yohendrick Piñango doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Brandon Valenzuela scores. George Springer scores.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe.

Yohendrick Piñango singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Kazuma Okamoto out at home on the throw, left fielder Roman Anthony to catcher Connor Wong. Daulton Varsho to 2nd.
Yohendrick Piñango singles on a line drive to center fielder Steven Kwan.

Yohendrick Piñango singles on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Brandon Valenzuela to 3rd.
Yohendrick Piñango doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jonny DeLuca.
